titleStmt.title: SII 9.474: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 474. (A.R. No. 719 of 1917.) ON THE SOUTH WALL OF THE SANKARESVARA TEMPLE AT AGALI, MADAKASIRA TALUK, ANANTAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1420, Piṅgala, Chaitra, śu. 15, Śanivāra, corresponding to A.D. 1497 March 18, Saturday. It records the grant of the village Paḷiganahaḷḷi, surnamed Immaḍi-Kāchāpura, situated in Agaḷi-sthala in Rāyadurga-Chāvaḍi, by Immaḍi-Kāchapa-Nāyaka, son of Kāchapa-Nāyaka of Ādavāni, for the offerings of the god Śaṅkaradēva at Agaḷi. The gift was made in the presence of the god Rāmēśvara at Sētubandha-Rāmēśvara, whither he had gone with Narasaṇa-Nāyaka. It is stated that Kāchapa-Nāyaka held the division of Agaḷi-sthala as a fief from Narasiṅgarāya-Mahārāya who had bestowed on Narasaṇṇa-Nāyaka the Rāyadurga-Chāvaḍi for his nāyakatana.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē . trailōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya
śaṁbhavē . svasti śrījayābhyudayaśālivāhanaśakavarṣaṁgaḷu 1420 neya varuṣakke
saluva piṁgaḷasaṁvatsarada cayitra śudha 15 śanivāradalu śrīmatu rāyadurgga
da cāvaḍige saluva Āgaḷiyastaḷada śaṁkaradēvarige gāigōpāḷa gaṁḍapeṁḍāra U
ddaṁḍava nuḍiva maṁḍalikara gaṁḍa svāmige svāmidrōhara gaṁḍa gajapatigaḷa miṁ
ḍa Ālasarigajāṁkuśa biriduḷḷa sivapūjāpuraṁdara dēvabrā(ṁ)hmaṇapratipālakarāda Āda
vāniya kācapanāyaka maganu Iṁmaḍi kācapanāyakanu Agaḷiya śaṁkaradēvarige sama
rpisida dhar(ṁ)maśāsanada kramaveṁteṁdare namage narasiṁgarāyamahārāyarū narasaṇanāyakara
nāyakatanakke koṭṭa rāyadurggada cāvaḍige saluva Agaḷiya staḷadoḷagaṇa paḷiganahaḷḷi
yeṁba grāmau Ā grāmakke saluva kuṁ2ṭeU Oḍadu Anēka kāla Ā grāma
U khilavāgi yiralāgi Ā grāmavanū rāpumāḍi Ā grāmada kuṁṭeyanū kaṭṭisi nā
Ū narasaṁṇanāyakara saṁgaḍa sētubaṁdharāmēśvarake hōdalli Ā rāmēśvaradēvara saṁni
dhiyalu tathātithiyalu naṁma taṁdegaḷu kācapanāyakarige dhar(ṁ)mavāgi Ā paḷiga
nahaḷḷi Eṁba grāmakke pratināma yiṁmaḍi kācāpuraveṁba hesarali Agaḷiya śaṁkaradē
varige sahiraṇyōdakadānadārāpūrvakavāgi sadyaḥparicchēdavāgi dhāreyaneradu samarpiside
vāgi Ā paḷiganahaḷḷige pratināmavāda yiṁmaḍi kācāpura Eṁba grāmakke saluva catussī
meyoḷagāda keṟe kuṁṭe Ēta guyyalu gade beddalu Aṇi Accukaṭṭu sahavāgi Ā śaṁkaradē
vara nayivēdya saha dēvatāvayibhava naḍeyabēkeṁdu dhāreyaneṟadu samarpiside
vāgi Ā paḷiganahaḷḷige pratināma
gaṇa nidhi nikṣēpa jala pāṣā
vutpatti samasta bari sahitavāgi
karadēvarū Ācaṁdrārkasthāyigaḷāgi
śāsana yiṁtoppudakke yī dharmaśāsanavanu
baraha . Ēkaiva bhaginī lōkē sarvēṣāmēva bhūbhujāṁ na bhōjyā na
pālanayōrmmadhyē dānācchrēyōnupālanaṁ dānātsvargamavāpnōti pālanādaccutaṁ
dattāṁ vā yō harēta vasuṁdharāṁ . ṣaṣṭirvaruṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimi ḥ .
Digital edition of SII 9.474 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
